$comment: Central finding policy for the BEAR Adventure security pipeline. Edit thresholds here rather than in workflow files. Severities use the canonical scale CRITICAL > HIGH > MEDIUM > LOW > INFO.

pr.$comment: Fast PR gate. Block new CRITICAL/HIGH. Baselined findings are reported, not blocked.

main.$comment: main branch. Block CRITICAL. HIGH reported unless it is an explicit mobile-config violation.

release.$comment: Release candidate gate. Block CRITICAL + HIGH and ALL explicit mobile-config violations. Baseline is ignored; only documented, non-expired exceptions suppress a finding.

sca.$comment: Software composition analysis thresholds, consumed by sca_gate.py. block_severities is the set of severities that fail the build when the vulnerability is fixable (has a known fixed version) or always when require_fix_available is false.

mobsf.$comment: MobSF gate thresholds consumed by mobsf_scan.py. Blocks when the MobSF appsec 'high' count (or 'critical' if present) exceeds the allowed budget for the mode.
